acceptance_criteria.text: Detail card opens from active list, health, and impact report.
Detail card shows metadata, impact summary, reasons, and event history.
Detail card shows good/bad examples when samples are available.
Detail card shows recent superadmin decisions.
Detail card keeps HITL revision/disable actions.
Relevant tests and production smoke checks pass.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_industry_patterns.py tests/test_service_keyword_scoring.py tests/test_beauty_service_optimization.py tests/test_service_problem_regeneration.py tests/test_worker_services_quality.py tests/test_content_plan_generation.py
known_gaps: Older impact events do not have sample_text; examples appear for new events after this deploy.
